_comment: Golden evalset for the brand checker. Each case is one regression test; Final Response Quality grades whether the agent's verdict matches expected. Seeded by hand to cover each rule (PASS + FAIL, single + multi-violation), then GROWN from triage: every genuine production failure the monitor flags becomes a new case (see docs/ct-loop-runbook.md). Brand rules: 1=no hype words; 2=no specific savings amounts / 'guaranteed'; 3=named discounts need 'while supplies last'; 4=sentence case, no ALL CAPS; 5=address as 'you', not 'consumers'/'users'. A larger set keeps the Final Response Quality metric low-variance so the drift threshold + prompt optimizer have a reliable signal.
